args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts

- Public surface: Exports Hono class, Context, HonoRequest type, and client types for external use.
- Internal names noticed: Hono import from './hono', type exports from './types' and './context'.
- Imports or neighbors: './hono', './types', './context', './request', './client'.
- Plain-English summary: Main entry point module that re-exports core classes and types for public consumption.
- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono class, Context class, type exports for Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, HonoRequest type, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions.

## src/types.ts

- Public surface: Defines core type interfaces for environment, error handling, middleware, and request schema.
- Internal names noticed: Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, HTTPResponseError, BlankEnv, BlankSchema.
- Imports or neighbors: Used by hono.ts, hono-base.ts, context.ts, request.ts, compose.ts, client files.
- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for the framework including environment types, handler signatures, and schema support.
- Copy-safe detail: HTTPResponseError extends Error, ErrorHandler type takes err (Error | HTTPResponseError) and context, Env interface defines extensions, Handler type uses Next function, Schema for type-level routing, TypedResponse for typed responses, NotFoundHandler for 404 handling.

## src/hono.ts

- Public surface: Hono class constructor accepting optional HonoOptions, sets up default router.
- Internal names noticed: Hono class, HonoBase extends, SmartRouter default, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter.
- Imports or neighbors: Imports from './hono-base', './router/reg-exp-router', './router/smart-router', './router/trie-router'.
- Plain-English summary: Main Hono application class that configures the router instance on initialization.
- Copy-safe detail: Class extends HonoBase<E, S, BasePath>, constructor accepts HonoOptions<E>, defaults to SmartRouter with [new RegExpRouter(), new TrieRouter()], options.router property used for custom router injection.

## src/hono-base.ts

- Public surface: onError method for custom error handlers, app routing and middleware composition.
- Internal names noticed: HonoBase class, errorHandler, #handleError, #notFoundHandler, router, onError, onNotFound.
- Imports or neighbors: Extends types.ts imports, uses compose.ts, context.ts, http-exception.ts.
- Plain-English summary: Base class with routing logic, error handling, and middleware composition using the compose function.
- Copy-safe detail: onError<E> returns self-chained instance, private errorHandler calls compose for request handling, #handleError wraps error handling in try-catch, app.errorHandler comparison for default error handler detection, clone.errorHandler property exists.

## src/context.ts

- Public surface: Context class providing request/response access and middleware execution support.
- Internal names noticed: Context class, error property, finalized, passThroughOnException, getFetchEvent, getExecutionContext.
- Imports or neighbors: Uses HonoRequest from './request', defines type exports for ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext.
- Plain-English summary: Request context holding request, response, error state, and middleware lifecycle management.
- Copy-safe detail: error: Error | undefined property, passes FetchEvent via getFetchEvent(), passes ExecutionContext via getExecutionContext(), finalized boolean tracks response completion, passThroughOnException() abstract method for error passthrough logic.

## src/request.ts

- Public surface: HonoRequest class representing the incoming HTTP request with access to raw Request object.
- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest class, raw property, json, text, body parsing methods.
- Imports or neighbors: Imports HTTPException from './http-exception', uses request constants.
- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper class that provides typed access to request body, methods, and throws HTTPException for body access after consumption.
- Copy-safe detail: throws HTTPException(500) when req.raw accessed directly after body consumption, HTTPException import from './http-exception', GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol reference exists for routing.

## src/request/constants.ts

- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol constant for routing match result identification.
- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol.
- Imports or neighbors: No imports, used by router implementation for match result handling.
- Plain-English summary: Single file exporting one unique symbol used internally for matching router results.
- Copy-safe detail: export const GET_MATCH_RESULT: unique symbol = Symbol(), used to identify successful route matches in router chain.

## src/utils/body.ts

- Public surface: parseBody async function accepting HonoRequest or Request with options.
- Internal names noticed: parseBody, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues.
- Imports or neighbors: Imports HonoRequest from '../request', uses request constants indirectly.
- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility handling form data, URL-encoded data, and multipart forms with dot/all options.
- Copy-safe detail: parseBody returns empty object for non-form-content types, parseFormData calls (request as Request).formData(), handleParsingAllValues supports array conversion via '[]' suffix, handleParsingNestedValues uses dot notation to build nested objects, Object.create(null) for form object to avoid prototype pollution, includes check for __proto__ in keys.

## src/compose.ts

- Public surface: compose function accepting middleware array with optional error/not-found handlers.
- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, index variable, isError, handler.
- Imports or neighbors: Imports Context from './context', Env/ErrorHandler/NotFoundHandler from './types'.
- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition using dispatch pattern similar to koa-compose for sequential middleware execution.
- Copy-safe detail: takes [[Function, unknown], unknown][] or [[Function]][] middleware array, onError and onNotFound as optional handlers, dispatch function tracks index to prevent multiple next() calls, catches errors and sets context.error before calling onError, context.finalized flag checked before not-found handler.

## src/http-exception.ts

- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error with status code and response object.
- Internal names noticed: HTTPException class, getResponse, HTTPExceptionOptions, res, status, message.
- Imports or neighbors: Imports ContentfulStatusCode from './utils/http-status'.
- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class for authentication failures and other fatal errors that should terminate middleware chain.
- Copy-safe detail: constructor(status: ContentfulStatusCode = 500, options?: HTTPExceptionOptions), getResponse returns existing response or creates new Response with status and message, extends Error class, options include res, message, and cause properties.

## src/client/index.ts

- Public surface: hc function for creating typed client requests, parseResponse and DetailedError exports.
- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, UnionToIntersection, ClientRequestImpl.
- Imports or neighbors: Exports from './client', './utils', imports from '../utils/cookie', '../utils/types'.
- Plain-English summary: Client-side HTTP client module providing hc() proxy-based API for typed fetch requests.
- Copy-safe detail: hc function returns UnionToIntersection<Client<T, Prefix>> proxy, exports parseResponse from './utils', exports DetailedError from './utils', hc accepts baseUrl and ClientRequestOptions, proxy handles .toString(), .valueOf(), method, param, query, json, form operations.

## src/client/client.ts

- Public surface: ClientRequestImpl fetch method accepting query params, form data, JSON, path params, headers, cookies.
- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl class, url, method, buildSearchParams, queryParams, pathParams, rBody, cType.
- Imports or neighbors: Imports from '../utils/cookie', './types', client utilities from './utils'.
- Plain-English summary: Client request implementation that builds fetch requests with query params, body, headers, cookies, and path substitution.
- Copy-safe detail: fetch method accepts args with query/form/json/param properties, constructs Headers from args.header and opt.headers, appends cookies via serialize(), removes /index from URLs, ClientRequestImpl constructor takes url, method, buildSearchParams option.

## src/client/types.ts

- Public surface: Client, ClientResponse, Fetch types, InferResponseType, InferRequestType for type inference.
- Internal names noticed: ClientResponse, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode.
- Imports or neighbors: Exports used by client.ts, utils.ts, fetch-result-please.ts.
- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for client-side HTTP operations including response inference and status code filtering.
- Copy-safe detail: ClientResponse has statusCode, statusText, data, error properties, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode type utility, type: 'basic' | 'cors' | 'default' | 'error' | 'opaque' | 'opaqueredirect', Response status codes categorized into ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode.

## src/client/utils.ts

- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge utilities.
- Internal names noticed: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, DetailedError, fetchRP, isObject.
- Imports or neighbors: Imports status codes from '../utils/http-status', fetchRP and DetailedError from './fetch-result-please'.
- Plain-English summary: Utility functions for client-side URL manipulation, query string building, and deep object merging.
- Copy-safe detail: mergePath base=path with no leading/trailing slashes, replaceUrlParam uses RegExp '/:' + k + '(?:{[^/]+})?\\??' for replacement, buildSearchParams iterates query object with array support, replaceUrlProtocol switches http<->ws, removeIndexString removes /index from URLs, deepMerge handles nested objects with isObject check.

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts

- Public surface: fetchRP async function parsing Response body, DetailedError class for structured errors.
- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, fetchRes, detectResponseType, nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex.
- Imports or neighbors: No direct imports, exports used by client/utils.ts and client/fetch-result-please.ts.
- Plain-English status: Response parsing utility that auto-detects JSON vs text and throws DetailedError on non-ok responses.
- Copy-safe detail: nullBodyResponses = [101, 204, 205, 304], fetchRP checks hasBody before extracting response data, DetailedError extends Error with detail, statusCode, code, log properties, detectResponseType uses jsonRegex /^application\/(?:[\w!#$%&*.^`~-]*\+)?json(?:;.+)?$/i, returns 'json' or 'text' from content-type.

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts

- Public surface: fire function that registers Hono app to handle FetchEvent in service worker context.
- Internal names noticed: fire, handle, addEventListener, HandleOptions, HandleOptions interface.
- Imports or neighbors: Imports Hono from '../../hono', Env/Schema from '../../types', handle from './handler'.
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that sets up addEventListener('fetch') with Hono app handler.
- Copy-safe detail: fire<E, S, BasePath> takes Hono app and optional HandleOptions, uses ts-expect-error for addEventListener typing, addEventListener('fetch', handle(app, options)) called, exports handle and fire.

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts

- Public surface: handle function returning Handler for FetchEvent with optional fetch override for 404 fallback.
- Internal names noticed: handle, Handler, FetchEvent, opts, fetch, respondWith.
- Imports or neighbors: Imports Hono from '../../hono', Env/Schema from '../../types', FetchEvent from './types'.
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker request handler wrapping app.fetch with 404 fallback to global fetch.
- Copy-safe detail: handle returns (evt: FetchEvent) => void Handler, wraps app.fetch in respondWith promise, opts.fetch called when status === 404, bind globalThis.fetch to HandleOptions.fetch, ts-expect-error passes FetchEvent to app.fetch.

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

- Public surface: FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent with request and respondWith.
- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent, waitUntil, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId.
- Imports or neighbors: No imports, used by service-worker/handler.ts.
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker FetchEvent interface defining available properties and methods for request handling.
- Copy-safe detail: FetchEvent extends ExtendableEvent, waits for waitUntil(f: Promise<any>), has clientId, handled Promise, preloadResponse Promise, request: Request, resultingClientId: string, respondWith(r: Response | PromiseLike<Response>): void method.

## Path Inventory

- src/index.ts
- src/types.ts
- src/hono.ts
- src/hono-base.ts
- src/context.ts
- src/request.ts
- src/request/constants.ts
- src/utils/body.ts
- src/compose.ts
- src/http-exception.ts
- src/client/index.ts
- src/client/client.ts
- src/client/types.ts
- src/client/utils.ts
- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
